SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: GAP_INP_COINS_AVG_1M 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This variable was new in 2013. It will only be populated if the plan has an enhanced benefit design 
with extra coverage in the gap. Plans that use a co-payment amount rather than a coinsurance 
percentage will not have a value in this field. The
